overall.description: First-person helicopter cockpit view (AS350) flying over coastal waters during golden hour. The aircraft approaches a shoreline, overflies a densely built coastal town with red-tiled roofs, then banks right toward the open sea as the sun sets on the horizon, creating a warm hazy atmosphere.

events.description: coastal city with red-tiled buildings comes into view on the left horizon

agents.ego_description: piloting helicopter toward coastline at steady altitude, preparing for land approach

entered.detail: AS350 helicopter instrument panel with flight gauges and GPS display
calm sea surface with golden hour reflections
small land masses visible through haze
densely packed urban area with red-roofed buildings approaching on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The helicopter flies over calm open water during golden hour, with the AS350 instrument panel visible in the foreground. Distant islands appear through the haze on the right, while a coastal city with dense red-tiled roofing gradually emerges on the left horizon as the aircraft approaches the shoreline.

events.description: helicopter passes from open water to directly over coastal city buildings
aircraft begins gentle right bank turn away from coastline

agents.ego_description: flying over urban coastal area, observing the dense city layout below before initiating turn

entered.detail: dense cluster of low-rise buildings with terracotta roofs directly below
narrow channels of water cutting through the coastal landmass

segments.scene_description: The helicopter overflies the coastal city, revealing dense urban development with red-tiled roofs and narrow water inlets. The aircraft maintains steady altitude while passing over the built-up area, then begins a gentle right turn that shifts the ocean from the right to the left side of the frame.

events.description: helicopter banks right significantly, showing side window frame and receding coastline

agents.ego_description: executing right bank turn to depart from coastal area, heading back toward open water

entered.detail: right side window frame becomes visible during bank maneuver

segments.scene_description: The helicopter executes a pronounced right bank turn, bringing the side window frame into view as the coastal city recedes behind the aircraft. The urban landscape fades from view, replaced by open water as the aircraft completes its turn away from land.

events.description: sun glare on water becomes more intense as helicopter faces toward setting sun

agents.ego_description: cruising over open water toward the setting sun, maintaining steady heading and altitude

entered.detail: bright golden reflection path of the sun stretching across the water surface
series of small islands silhouetted against the hazy horizon

segments.scene_description: The helicopter flies steadily over open water toward the setting sun, which creates a brilliant golden glare across the calm sea surface. Distant islands appear as dark silhouettes on the horizon through the thick atmospheric haze, while the instrument panel remains steady in the foreground during the tranquil cruise.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous flight from a calm open sea, across a densely packed coastal city, and back out toward the horizon during the golden hour. It begins with the AS350 instrument panel in the foreground as the aircraft approaches a shoreline, where a city of red-tiled roofs gradually emerges from the haze on the left. As the helicopter overflies the urban development and its narrow water inlets, the camera begins a gentle right turn that shifts the ocean from the right to the left side of the frame. The scene then transitions into a pronounced right bank, bringing the side window into view as the city recedes and the landscape is replaced by open water. Finally, the aircraft levels out to fly steadily toward the setting sun, which casts a brilliant golden glare across the sea and silhouettes distant islands through a thick atmospheric haze.
